news.t: They may be attracting big money, but these ETFs may not be as eco-friendly as you think
7 Megatrend Stock ETFs With Massive Potential
There's no hotter area on Wall Street than ESG with sustainability-focused funds nearing $2 trillion

holdings.infoBox: ESGU is an equity ETF with a total of 280 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.55%, Apple at 6.58%, Microsoft at 4.35%, Alphabet at 3.66%, and Amazon.com at 3.59%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Aware MSCI USA ETF (ESGU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Extended ESG Focus index. The fund tracks an index composed of US companies that are selected and weighted for positive environmental, social and governance characteristics. ESGU was launched on Dec 1, 2016 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Extended ESG Focus Index

data.title: ETF Edge: SEC hearing on ESG and crypto
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani with Vettafi's Dave Nadig and DWS Group's Arne Noack, join 'Halftime Report' to discuss climate control and cryptocurrency ahead of the SEC hearings.

data.title: I welcome the scrutiny of ESG investing, says Capricorn's Michaela Edwards
data.text: Michaela Edwards, Capricorn Investment Group partner, joins 'Closing Bell' to discuss ESG investing and the outflow of funds from the sector in the last few months.

data.title: They may be attracting big money, but these ETFs may not be as eco-friendly as you think
data.text: Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) ETFs lack clarity, so investors don't always know where their money is going, S&P Global's Mona Naqvi warns.

data.title: Sustainable investing is mostly marketing and PR: Former BlackRock exec
data.text: Tariq Fancy, former Blackrock CIO, joins 'Power Lunch' to discuss Larry Fink's recent comments and how sustainable investing has unfolded in recent years.tan

data.title: There's no hotter area on Wall Street than ESG with sustainability-focused funds nearing $2 trillion
data.text: Record inflows into sustainability-focused funds during the first quarter pushed total assets to nearly $2 trillion.

data.title: How 2020 has impacted environmental, social and governance investing
data.text: Morningstar's Jon Hale, MSCI's Linda-Eling Lee and Main Management's Kim Arthur discuss how the past year has impacted ESG ETFs. With CNBC's Bob Pisani.
